Package com.kbtu.university.model.research

Class ResearchPaper

java.lang.Object
com.kbtu.university.model.research.ResearchPaper
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ResearchPaper>
public class ResearchPaper extends Object implements Comparable<ResearchPaper>, Serializable
Published research artifact. Equality and hashing are based on DOI, which is the canonical unique identifier for a paper. Natural ordering is by citations descending so that lists of papers default to most-cited first.
